notes.title: demo_fake Eva v2 runtime skeleton
notes.text: Eva v2 has a typed runtime skeleton for explicit dry-run, route, plan, and safe execution previews. Normal chat routing remains unchanged.

notes.title: demo_fake Research Memory local notes
notes.text: Research Memory stores sanitized local notes and supports lexical search, retrieval, topic summaries, tags, quality warnings, and exports.

notes.title: demo_fake MCP policy
notes.text: MCP resources are cataloged for future connector work but disabled by default. Public demos do not execute MCP tools.

notes.title: demo_fake Resource Registry
notes.text: The resource registry records tool categories, risk levels, default-enabled state, and policy notes without installing packages or running tools.

notes.title: demo_fake browser automation safety
notes.text: Browser automation must be visible, user-commanded, and must not read cookies, tokens, localStorage, sessionStorage, passwords, or private pages.

notes.title: demo_fake desktop automation safety
notes.text: Desktop control is bounded by permission gates and target confidence. Public release demos do not run PyAutoGUI or raw coordinate clicks.

notes.title: demo_fake vector search disabled
notes.text: Research Memory vector search has an optional local interface but remains disabled by default. Lexical retrieval remains the baseline.
